name: project-onboarding
description: Complete guide to set up the full AI-assisted development ecosystem for any project. Use when joining a new project, bootstrapping AI tools from scratch, onboarding a codebase. Covers the full creator chain: session-knowledge, agents, hooks, workflows, orchestration, and conductor in dependency order.
whenToUse: Set up the complete AI-assisted development ecosystem for any project. Each phase builds on the previous one. **Skipping a phase leaves a gap
